title: Workflow Activity Catalog v0.2
description: Catalog of workflow activities for a single package source. Extracted by PackageFurnace; may be enriched with human-authored annotations.

schema.description: Schema identity and version. Verify before parsing.

source.description: The package this catalog was extracted from.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this catalog was generated.

activities.$comment: Order is not guaranteed. Use the id field as the stable key.
activities.description: All non-hidden workflow activities in this package.

enums.description: Public enum types referenced by activity member data types.

namespaceMappings.description: XML namespace → CLR namespace mappings from XmlnsDefinitionAttribute. Within a catalog, entries are deduplicated by (xmlNamespace, sourceAssembly). When merging across catalogs in a set, the first occurrence of each xmlNamespace wins for prefix assignment; clrNamespaces lists are per-catalog and are not merged.

kind.description: 'nuget-package': from a NuGet feed. 'dotnet-runtime': from the .NET WF4 runtime. 'local-path': from a local DLL or folder (dev-loop, CI pre-publish). 'synthetic': hand-authored; not extracted by PackageFurnace — used for gap analysis and activity design planning. Note for XAML generators: synthetic catalogs may omit or partially populate namespaceMappings; generators should emit a diagnostic warning when encountering synthetic-sourced activities, as output cannot be verified against a real assembly. Synthetic activities are intended for planning and design tooling, not production XAML generation.

feedUrl.description: NuGet feed URL this package was sourced from. null when not recorded.

license.description: free-form. SPDX expression or licenseUrl fallback.

packageTypes.description: nuspec <packageTypes>. Empty array when not declared.

activity.description: A workflow primitive that can be placed in a workflow graph.

id.description: Stable compound identifier: '{fullName}@{source.id}/{source.version}'. Matches the PackageFurnace engine-result activity id.

fullName.description: Fully-qualified CLR type name. No backtick arity suffix.

displayName.description: Name shown in the Studio activity panel. null = absent in source.

description.description: Short description / tooltip shown in Studio. null = absent in source.

category.description: Activity panel category path. null = absent in source.

visibility.description: 'Browsable': appears in Studio activity panel. 'Legacy': Classic-mode only. Hidden activities are excluded at transform time and never appear here.

hasGenericParameters.description: true when the CLR type has open generic parameters (requires x:TypeArguments in XAML).

genericParameterNames.description: Generic parameter names in declaration order. Empty array when hasGenericParameters is false.

members.$comment: Only browsable members are included. Order is not guaranteed.
members.description: Configurable members: arguments, child-activity slots, variable scopes, plain properties.

enrichment.description: Human-authored enrichment data layered on top of extracted metadata. null when no enrichment has been applied. Structure is defined separately by the enrichment pipeline.

member.description: A single configurable member of an activity.

name.description: CLR property name. Stable key within members[].

displayName.description: Member name as shown in Studio Properties panel. Guaranteed non-null: the extraction pipeline falls back to the CLR property name when no display attribute is present.

dataType.description: CLR type, fully namespace-qualified, C#-style generics (e.g. 'System.Activities.InArgument<System.String>'). null when absent in source.

argumentDirection.description: Data flow direction. Non-null only when memberKind is 'argument'. Maps to WF4 CLR argument wrapper types: 'in' → System.Activities.InArgument<T>, 'out' → System.Activities.OutArgument<T>, 'in-out' → System.Activities.InOutArgument<T>.

isRequiredArgument.description: Whether this argument must be bound before the workflow runs. Always false when memberKind is not 'argument'.

description.description: Tooltip text. null = absent in source.

category.description: Properties panel group (e.g. 'Input', 'Output', 'Options'). null = absent in source.

defaultValue.description: From DefaultValueAttribute, serialised as string. null = absent in source.

typeConverter.description: CLR full name of the TypeConverter. null = absent in source.

enumType.description: A public enum type referenced by activity member data types.

fullName.description: Fully-qualified CLR type name. Nested type separator is '.' not '/'.

underlyingType.description: CLR full name of the integral backing type, e.g. 'System.Int32'.

xmlnsMapping.description: One XML namespace → CLR namespace mapping from XmlnsDefinitionAttribute.

clrNamespaces.description: CLR namespaces mapped to this XML namespace.

sourceAssembly.description: Assembly name (no extension) where the attribute was declared.
